description_long: This object is a sleek, modern knife or short sword with a streamlined, aerodynamic profile and a dark, metallic finish. The blade is broad and tapers to a sharp point, with subtle angular facets along its length, giving it a futuristic appearance. The handle is integrated into the body, slightly raised and contoured for grip, but lacks any visible wrapping or distinct pommel. The overall form is symmetrical along its length, with a gentle curve and no visible guard separating the blade from the handle. The surface is smooth with a matte sheen, and the coloration is primarily a gradient of dark gray to bluish tones. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings, emphasizing a utilitarian, high-tech design.
description: A sleek, futuristic knife or short sword with a broad, pointed blade and integrated handle, finished in dark metallic tones with a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated, streamlined profile and the gentle upward curve of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical, pointed blade and the narrow, contoured handle section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the streamlined shape and showing the subtle angular facets along the blade.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the handle's bifurcated end and the overall width of the object at the grip.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, contoured, smooth, no visible wrapping or pommel
